module.name: require-jsdoc-anonymous-functions
module.description: Require JSDoc comments on anonymous function-like constructs outside of test files.

scenarios.name: should allow anonymous functions when a JSDoc block is present
scenarios.given: an anonymous function-like construct preceded by a /** ... */ comment

scenarios.name: should allow anonymous functions in test files without JSDoc
scenarios.given: an anonymous function in a .test.ts file with no JSDoc

scenarios.name: should ignore named functions
scenarios.given: a named function-like construct without JSDoc

scenarios.name: should report an anonymous function with no JSDoc comment
scenarios.given: an anonymous function-like construct in a non-test source file with no preceding JSDoc block

scenarios.name: should autofix missing JSDoc for standalone anonymous export default function
scenarios.given: an anonymous default export function on a standalone line in a non-test source file
scenarios.when: the rule reports a missing JSDoc comment
scenarios.then: autofix inserts a generated JSDoc block above the export statement
